title: leptinella altilitoralis
intro: Leptinella altilitoralis, also known as Raoul's leptinella, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to New Zealand. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Leptinella altilitoralis are thought to include reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. However, more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and tinctures.
